bge-small-en-v1.5.name: BGE Small En v1.5
bge-small-en-v1.5.description: High-performance, lightweight text embedding model by BAAI.

tinyllama-1.1b-chat-fp16.name: TinyLlama 1.1B Chat FP16
tinyllama-1.1b-chat-fp16.description: Small NPU validation model for OpenVINO GenAI.

tinyllama-1.1b-chat-int4.name: TinyLlama 1.1B Chat INT4
tinyllama-1.1b-chat-int4.description: Compact INT4 starter model for lower storage and memory pressure.

qwen2.5-1.5b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-1.5b-fp16.description: Compact Qwen instruct model exported in the FP16 format used by Intel NPU.

qwen2.5-3b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-3b-fp16.description: Higher-quality Qwen instruct model with retained CPU and GPU certification. Candidate for manual NPU testing.

phi-3.5-mini-fp16.name: Phi-3.5 Mini Instruct FP16
phi-3.5-mini-fp16.description: Microsoft Phi-3.5 mini exported as FP16 for Intel NPU testing.

llama-3.2-3b-fp16.name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct FP16
llama-3.2-3b-fp16.description: Meta Llama 3.2 3B exported as FP16 for NPU; gated model, set HF_TOKEN before converting.

qwen2.5-0.5b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 0.5B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-0.5b-fp16.description: Ultra-compact Qwen instruct model for CPU testing and candidate NPU testing.

deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-1.5b-fp16.name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 1.5B FP16
deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-1.5b-fp16.description: Reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1, exported as FP16 for NPU.

llama-3.2-1b-fp16.name: Llama 3.2 1B Instruct FP16
llama-3.2-1b-fp16.description: Meta Llama 3.2 1B exported as FP16 for NPU; gated model, set HF_TOKEN before converting.

smollm2-135m-fp16.name: SmolLM2 135M Instruct FP16
smollm2-135m-fp16.description: Ultra-lightweight SmolLM2 model (135M parameters) for lightning-fast testing and NPU/CPU debugging.

smollm2-360m-fp16.name: SmolLM2 360M Instruct FP16
smollm2-360m-fp16.description: Efficient small model (360M parameters) for compatibility testing; NPU behavior depends on platform and driver.

smollm2-1.7b-fp16.name: SmolLM2 1.7B Instruct FP16
smollm2-1.7b-fp16.description: Small SmolLM2 FP16 model and candidate for NPU testing; compatibility depends on platform and driver.

gemma-2-2b-fp16.name: Gemma 2 2B Instruct FP16
gemma-2-2b-fp16.description: Google Gemma 2 2B Instruct model exported as FP16 for NPU; gated model, set HF_TOKEN before converting.

phi-4-mini-fp16.name: Phi-4 Mini Instruct FP16
phi-4-mini-fp16.description: Microsoft Phi-4 mini reasoning model exported as FP16 for Intel NPU testing.

qwen2.5-7b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 7B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-7b-fp16.description: Full-sized Qwen2.5 7B model for high-end systems, exported as FP16.

llama-3.1-8b-fp16.name: Llama 3.1 8B Instruct FP16
llama-3.1-8b-fp16.description: Meta Llama 3.1 8B model exported as FP16; gated model, set HF_TOKEN before converting.

qwen2.5-14b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 14B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-14b-fp16.description: Mid-sized Qwen model for high-end systems (requires 64GB RAM).

deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b-fp16.name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 14B FP16
deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-14b-fp16.description: High-quality 14B reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1 (requires 64GB RAM).

qwen2.5-32b-fp16.name: Qwen2.5 32B Instruct FP16
qwen2.5-32b-fp16.description: Very large Qwen2.5 model for extreme accuracy (requires 64GB RAM).

deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b-fp16.name: DeepSeek-R1 Distill Qwen 32B FP16
deepseek-r1-distill-qwen-32b-fp16.description: High-end 32B reasoning model distilled from DeepSeek-R1 (requires 64GB RAM).
